a:r.a:t: Who we're targeting and why they move to Abra
Multi-asset SMA + USDAF yield + zero rehypothecation
Needs fiduciary-grade governance, reporting, tax efficiency
RIA fiduciary + segregated vaults + model portfolios
Wants yield on idle BTC/stablecoin reserves without counterparty risk
SMA-based yield, lending, and collateral optimization
Counterparty trust deficit; rehypothecation concerns post-2023 exit
Zero rehypothecation + SEC oversight + competitive yield
No single regulated platform for digital asset advisory
White-label SMA infrastructure for client portfolio management
